fields.title: Fix stale footer diff stats
fields.description: Tau footer still shows stale diff stats after commit/push. Investigate why footer state does not refresh and make it reflect the current git worktree status.
fields.design: Trace the footer status data flow, reproduce the stale diff count, identify the cache or refresh bug, and update the footer/service logic so git diff stats are recomputed when repository state changes.
fields.acceptance_criteria: After commit/push or other git state changes, tau footer updates to the current diff stats without showing stale values. Investigation captures root cause and regression coverage is added where practical.
fields.notes: Root cause: tau runtime scope exited immediately after setup, so footer/persistence/sandbox background loops started with forkScoped were getting torn down; footer also polled git/beads state using process.cwd() instead of tracking the active session cwd. Fixed by keeping runTau's scoped runtime alive, tracking currentCwd from session events, and triggering immediate footer hygiene refreshes on session start/switch/turn end. Added app-runtime regression test.
fields.close_reason: Kept tau runtime scope alive so footer background refresh loops keep running, switched footer hygiene polling to the active session cwd, and added regression coverage.
